name: Chatons Projects
description: List and manage Chatons projects from conversations. View all projects including those hidden from the sidebar.

tools.name: chatons_list_projects
tools.label: List Chatons projects
tools.description: List all projects in Chatons, including those hidden from the sidebar. Optionally filter by archived status.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool to see all projects in the workspace, including hidden ones.
By default, only active (non-archived) projects are returned.
Set includeArchived to true to see archived projects as well.

includeArchived.description: Include archived projects in the results (default: false).

limit.description: Maximum number of projects to return (default: all).

tools.name: chatons_get_project
tools.label: Get Chatons project details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Chatons project by its ID.
tools.promptSnippet: Get details of a specific Chatons project.

tools.name: chatons_get_project_conversations
tools.label: Get project conversations
tools.description: List all conversations belonging to a specific project.

tools.name: chatons_get_hidden_projects
tools.label: Get hidden projects
tools.description: Get only the projects that are hidden from the sidebar.

tools.name: chatons_get_visible_projects
tools.label: Get visible projects
tools.description: Get only the projects that are visible in the sidebar (not hidden).
